arts.ttl: Man Utd 'don't feel pressure' despite job redundancies
arts.sum: “They [the Man Utd squad] don't feel that pressure of people losing their job,” Amorim told reporters ahead of his side’s clash against Ipswich Town on Wednesday. Despite the club’s poor recent transfer history, Ratcliffe has opted to save money through staff redundancies and Amorim has admitted that his side’s form has contributed to up to 450 people losing their jobs at Old Trafford since last summer.

arts.ttl: Antony has sent a warning to all of Man United's transfer targets by proving one thing
arts.sum: With Manchester United likely to have to splash the cash once again when the summer transfer window rolls around, Old Trafford flop Antony has seemingly led a telling example

arts.ttl: 'I played with Marcus Rashford at Man Utd – I didn't think he'd make it for one reason'
arts.sum: One of Marcus Rashford's former Manchester United academy teammates has explained why he initially didn't understand the hype surrounding the current Aston Villa loanee

arts.ttl: Two candidates to be the next Manchester United striker can state their case
arts.sum: Man Utd face Ipswich Town in the Premier League on Wednesday night and all eyes will be on the strkers at their respective clubs.

arts.sum: Man United will be eyeing a return to winning ways when they welcome Ipswich Town to Old Trafford in the Premier League on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim gamble as key man's role changes - Manchester United predicted line-up vs Ipswich
arts.sum: Man United will be eager to halt a three-game winless run in the Premier League when Ipswich Town visit Old Trafford tonight.

arts.ttl: 'We aren't helping him' - Manchester United coach Amorim speaks out on Rasmus Hojlund goal drought
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund has scored only seven times this season for Man United and has gone 16 games without a goal.

arts.ttl: Is Man Utd vs Ipswich on TV? Channel, live stream and kick-off time details
arts.sum: A struggling Manchester United host a relegation-battling Ipswich Town at Old Trafford on Wednesday, as both sides look to ascend the Premier League standings and reverse their poor form

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Ruben Amorim maintains job loss stance as club-record transfer backed
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has continued to blame the poor results on the pitch for the club's major staff cuts after another round of redundancies was announced

arts.sum: Man Utd take on Ipswich in the Premier League on Wednesday. Preview includes team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.
